title: ERCOT SCED System Lambda JSON API
description:
System Lambda (λ) as reported by ERCOT. System Lambda is the Shadow Price for the system-wide Power Balance constraint.

The Shadow Price for the Power Balance constraint represents system costs to serve the last MW of load.

💡 λ is the cost of providing one MWh of energy at the reference bus and is therefore the energy component of the LMP at each Settlement Point.
